अिधसूचना猒 म犆 िन玈िलिखत संशोधन करती है। 2. अिधसूचना सं榐या सा.का.िन. 3165(अ) 琈दनांक 12 琈दस瀓बर, 2014 म犆, 灹िवि玗 सं榐या 3 पर, िन玈िलिखत 灹िवि玗 灹ित瀡थािपत क琉 जाएंगी, अथा榁त्:- सद瀡य (ख) धारा 5क क琉 उप-धारा (1) के ख瀃ड (ख) के अंतग榁त के瀈灶ीय सरकार के 灹ितिनिध 3. अपर सिचव, 炈म एवं रोजगार मं灴ालय, भारत सरकार, नई 琈द瀖ली। 3. 琈दनांक 23 मई, 2013 क琉 अिधसूचना सं. का.आ.1330(अ) म犆, 灙म सं榐या 4 पर, िन玈िलिखत 灹िवि玗 灹ित瀡थािपत क琉 जाएंगी, अथा榁त्:- -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] सद瀡य (ख) धारा 5क क琉 उप-धारा (1) के ख瀃ड (ख) के अंतग榁त के瀈灶ीय सरकार के 灹ितिनिध 4. महािनदेशक, 炈म क瀖याण, 炈म एवं रोजगार मं灴ालय, भारत सरकार, नई 琈द瀖ली। [सं.वी-20012/1/2013-एसएस-II] मनीष कुमार गु玅ा, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF LABOUR AND EMPLOYMENT NOTIFICATION New Delhi, 23rd April, 2015 S.O. 1070(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of Section 5A of the Employees’ Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952 (19 of 1952), the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Central Board of Trustees (Employees’ Provident Fund) and makes the following amendment in this Ministry’s Notifications published in the Gazette of India having No. S.O. 1330(E) dated 23rd May, 2013 and No. G.S.R. 3165(E) dated 12th December, 2014. 2. In the Notification No. G.S.R. 3165(E) dated 12th December, 2014, at Sl. No. 3, the following entry shall be substituted, namely— MEMBERS (b) Representatives of Central Government under clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 5A. 3. Additional Secretary, Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India, New Delhi 3. In the Notification No. S.O. 1330(E) dated 23rd May, 2013, at Sl. No. 4, the following entry shall be substituted, namely - MEMBERS (b) Representatives of Central Government under clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 5A. 4. Director General, Labour Welfare, Ministry of Labour & Employment, Government of India, New Delhi. [No.V-20012/1/2013-SS.II] MANISH KUMAR GUPTA, Jt. Secy.
